title: stelis arrecta
intro: Stelis arrecta, also known as the "hairy stelis," is a type of orchid plant native to Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Stelis arrecta include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Stelis arrecta is typically prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties for therapeutic purposes.
